hero.intro: I'm Wensheng Chen; I go by Wilson. Previously CTO at The Juicy Crab; now building [bestpos.io](https://bestpos.io) and AI-powered developer tools.
paragraphs: I am currently exploring the intersection of artificial intelligence and developer tools, building systems that act as true thought partners.
My primary focus right now is on reducing friction between intention and execution for software engineering teams through context-aware agents.

aboutLink.label: More about me and my philosophy

currentFocus.title: Current Focus & Problems
currentFocus.description: What I'm obsessed with now and the problems I believe matter.
paragraphs: The core problem I am obsessed with is knowledge fragmentation. We have more tools than ever, yet context is continuously lost across platforms.
I believe the next wave of foundational companies will be built around unifying this context into seamless, invisible workflows rather than adding new dashboards.
